steps.title: Identify the rate
steps.content: The expression $f(m)=28-4m$ gives the account balance after $m$ movies. The coefficient $-4$ means the balance decreases by $4$ dollars for each movie rented.

steps.title: Use the withdrawn amount
steps.content: The question asks for the amount withdrawn each time, so use the positive amount $4$, not the negative change in balance. The answer is B.
